suppress.notes: CVE-2025-21199 applies to Microsoft Azure Agent Installer products under the CPE family cpe:2.3:a:microsoft:azure_agent:* and the NVD affected-software entries are for the "backup" and "site_recovery" products. This repo contains the Java libraries com.microsoft.azure:applicationinsights-core and com.microsoft.azure:applicationinsights-web, which are being mapped to the generic azure_agent CPE by Dependency-Check. Keep this suppression only for that false-positive CPE match.
Azure SDK artifacts are at the latest stable versions available to this build. dependency-check maps these independent com.azure artifacts to the broad microsoft:azure_sdk_for_java CPE.
file name: kotlin-stdlib-1.9.25.jar file name: kotlin-stdlib-jdk7-1.9.25.jar file name: kotlin-stdlib-jdk8-1.9.25.jar
file name: jackson-databind-2.22.0.jar file name: jackson-databind-3.0.1.jar
